title: lespedeza buergeri var. oldhamii
intro: Lespedeza buergeri var. oldhamii, also known as Oldham's Lespedeza, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Lespedeza buergeri var. oldhamii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
